body.processed:
Join Harvest Hope Food Bank for our annual Spring Community Food Drive. Drop off non-perishable food donations at any of our 35 collection sites throughout Riverside County.

Most Needed Items

  • Canned vegetables and fruit (low sodium/no sugar added preferred)
  • Peanut butter and other nut butters
  • Whole grain pasta and rice
  • Canned tuna, chicken, and beans
  • Cooking oil and spices
  • Baby food and formula

Collection Sites

Drop-off locations include all Riverside County libraries, participating grocery stores, fire stations, and our main warehouse. Visit our website for a complete list of collection sites.
body.summary: Join Harvest Hope Food Bank for our annual Spring Community Food Drive. Drop off non-perishable food donations at any of our 35 collection sites throughout Riverside County.Most Needed ItemsCanned veg

nodes.title: Volunteer Sort Day - March

body.processed:
Help us sort and pack thousands of pounds of donated food at our main warehouse. This is a great opportunity for individuals, families, and corporate groups to make an immediate impact.

What to Expect

  • Brief orientation and safety training (15 minutes)
  • Sort and inspect donated food items for quality
  • Pack family food boxes and backpack program bags
  • Light to moderate physical activity (standing, lifting up to 30 lbs)

What to Bring

Wear closed-toe shoes and comfortable clothing. Water and snacks provided. All volunteers must sign a waiver (minors need parent/guardian signature).
body.summary: Help us sort and pack thousands of pounds of donated food at our main warehouse. This is a great opportunity for individuals, families, and corporate groups to make an immediate impact.What to ExpectB

nodes.location: Harvest Hope Main Warehouse, 750 Distribution Way

image.alt: Volunteers sorting and packing food donations

nodes.title: Harvest Gala 2026 - An Evening to End Hunger

body.processed:
Join us for our annual fundraising gala, featuring a gourmet dinner prepared by local chefs, live music, a silent auction, and inspiring stories from the families we serve.

Event Highlights

  • Gourmet four-course dinner by Chef Maria Santos of Riverside Bistro
  • Live music by the Riverside Jazz Quartet
  • Silent auction with over 100 donated items and experiences
  • Keynote address by nationally recognized hunger policy expert
  • Community Impact Awards presentation

Tickets

Individual tickets: $150. Tables of 10: $1,250. Corporate sponsorship packages available starting at $2,500. All proceeds support Harvest Hope Food Bank's hunger relief programs.
body.summary: Join us for our annual fundraising gala, featuring a gourmet dinner prepared by local chefs, live music, a silent auction, and inspiring stories from the families we serve.Event HighlightsGourmet four
